upload_hint: Drop your photo here, or click to upload
download_tip: Images saved. Follow the steps below to upload them.
uncalibrated: Avatar position not yet calibrated — overlay may be slightly off.
steps: Upload any photo you want to use.
Drag and zoom so the banner rectangle and avatar circle both look good.
Click "Download 2 images" — two files are saved: banner.jpg and avatar.jpg.
On LinkedIn, go to your profile and click the edit pencil on the background photo, then upload banner.jpg. Then click the edit pencil on your profile photo and upload avatar.jpg.
Done — your banner and profile photo will appear as one seamless image.
post_download_steps: Click the pencil icon on your background banner → upload banner.jpg.
Click the pencil icon on your profile photo → upload avatar.jpg.
Accept the default crop without dragging — do not reposition.
